title: Avoidable early deaths destroy jungle tempo
body: Free deaths in the early game are one of the fastest ways to lose jungle control because they break tempo, remove pressure from the map, and often cost a camp cycle or an objective window at the same time. Reducing avoidable deaths is usually more valuable than adding one extra speculative gank.
actionables: Review each early death as a tempo event, not only as a combat mistake.
Label whether the death cost you camps, vision, or objective posture in the next 30 to 60 seconds.
Prioritize cutting one avoidable early death before trying to increase overall aggression.

source.title: Guia Definitiva de la Jungla para Subir a Challenger en la Nueva Temporada 2026 de League of Legends
source.notes: Built from the source's repeated emphasis that avoidable deaths are a major reason players fail to stabilize and climb.
